prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-WS10PCCUPS-YJJ-74613-72 Product Type: MEASURING_CUP Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Cream Wheat Straw Measuring Cups Spoons Set Cooking Baking Tools 10pc Description: Want to step up your cooking and baking game? Then you need the Beille 10pc Measuring Tools Set made with wheat straw. These measuring cups and spoons are made with an innovative plant based material called wheat straw that mimics classic measuring tools without the harmful byproducts of traditional plastic.

Wheat straw is a bioplastic that is not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable and a great zero waste option. It’s certified BPA free and is food-grade safe so you can count on it for food and meal prep.

The measuring tools set comes with 10 assorted cups and spoons in essential cooking and baking sizes: 1 cup, 1/2 cup, 1/3 cup, 1/4 cup, 1/8 cup, 1tsp, 1/2 tsp, 1 tsp, 1 Tbsp, and 1/2 Tbsp. All tools included are dishwasher safe and safe for use with both hot and cold food prep ingredients.

With a conveniently stackable design, these measuring tools all fit neatly inside of each other for easy storage and organization when not in use. The handles come with a slot and matching keyring, so you can hang them to store and dry if preferred. They come in a stylish and modern cream color that will fit perfectly with just about any kitchen decor.

Every kitchen needs a set of durable, solid, and reliable measuring cups. With the Beille wheat straw plant based measuring tools, you can bake and cook with peace of mind knowing you’re doing your part to protect yourself, your family, and the planet from harmful materials. Search Terms: wheat straw measuring cup set baking supplies tools cooking chef restaurant equipment sustainable products bake food meal prep kitchen starter set wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials measuring spoons tablespoon teaspoon Features: - 10 ASSORTED MEASURING TOOLS: Beille measuring tool set comes with 10 assorted cups and spoons for cooking and baking in essential sizes 1 cup, 1/2 cup, 1/3 cup, 1/4 cup, 1/8 cup, 1tsp, 1/2 tsp, 1 tsp, 1 Tbsp and 1/2 Tbsp; Must have set of measuring tools for food and meal prep - PLANT BASED MATERIAL: Measuring cups and spoons are made of bioplastic wheat straw; plant based material not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable; Innovative material is a great zero waste option; Certified BPA free - SOLID AND DURABLE: Beille wheat straw measuring cups mimic traditional plastic measuring tools without harmful byproducts; Cups and spoons are dishwasher safe and are safe for both hot and cold food prep items - STACKABLE DESIGN: All spoons and cups fit neatly inside of each other for easy storage and organization when not in use; Handles feature slots and come with a matching keyring for hanging storage if preferred; Stylish cream color will fit your kitchen decor - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: cream; Material: 60% wheat straw, 40% polypropylene; Dimensions of stacked set: 6 x 3 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
